content:
# IVX EXPO PHASE 1 — FINAL BUILD PIPELINE REPAIR AND APK RELEASE

MODE: EXECUTE NOW
PRIORITY: P0
GOAL: Finish the existing Expo/React Native IVX application, deploy the mixed feed correctly, repair the build environment, generate the signed APK, and provide a direct download link.

OWNER DECISION:

- Expo/React Native is the active Phase 1 production application.
- Kotlin is preserved for future Phase 2.
- Do not delete Kotlin.
- Do not fix or build Kotlin now.
- Do not mix Kotlin into Expo.
- Do not create a second app.
- Do not restart development from a template.

==================================================
ITEM 1 — FREEZE PROJECT OWNERSHIP
==================================================

Canonical active sources:

- Mobile app: expo/
- Backend: backend/
- Future Kotlin Phase 2: android-ivx-holdings/ — preserved but inactive
- Repository: ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest
- Branch: main

Create or update project documentation stating:

expo/ = ACTIVE PHASE 1
backend/ = ACTIVE PRODUCTION BACKEND
android-ivx-holdings/ = PRESERVED PHASE 2, EXCLUDED FROM CURRENT BUILD

Verify Kotlin is excluded from:

- Expo builds
- EAS
- package scripts
- CI/CD
- Render
- current APK
- Expo routing
- current production deployments

Do not remove Kotlin files.

==================================================
ITEM 2 — FIX THE HOME MIXED-FEED API 404
==================================================

Current failure:

The Home mixed-feed endpoint returns 404 or is not deployed.

Trace:

Home screen
→ feed client
→ API route
→ backend handler
→ feed composition service
→ production deployment

Inspect:

- exact endpoint expected by Expo
- exact endpoint implemented in backend
- route registration
- HTTP method
- route prefix
- authentication requirement
- deployed backend SHA
- frontend API base URL
- stale bundle or stale endpoint reference

Required production result:

- HTTP 200
- valid JSON
- first 3 items: investment_card
- fourth item: reel
- correct Casa Rosario record
- stable order
- no fallback data
- no mock data
- no 404

Add route tests and production smoke tests.

==================================================
ITEM 3 — DEPLOY display_type LIVE
==================================================

The backend and Expo feed must use one explicit field:

display_type:
- investment_card
- reel

Verify production behavior:

1. Jacksonville → investment_card
2. Casa Rosario regular deal → investment_card
3. One Stop Development → investment_card
4. Casa Rosario video/reel → reel

Do not infer card type only from media type.

Confirm:

- database/source mapping
- API serialization
- Expo TypeScript type
- Home routing
- Landing routing
- Reels routing
- production response

Return the real production payload with sensitive values redacted.

==================================================
ITEM 4 — FIX TYPESCRIPT COMPLETELY
==================================================

Current status indicates TypeScript fails.

Run TypeScript from the real Expo project root.

Inspect:

- tsconfig
- missing modules
- invalid path aliases
- missing type declarations
- workspace/root resolution
- Expo Router types
- component props
- display_type union
- feed payload types
- InvestmentCard props
- CanonicalInvestmentReelCard props

Required result:

- 0 TypeScript errors
- no ignored production errors
- no temporary `any` added just to silence checks
- no `skipLibCheck` used to hide application errors unless already approved and justified

Return each error found and the file that fixed it.

==================================================
ITEM 5 — FIX LINT COMPLETELY
==================================================

Current status indicates lint fails.

Repair:

- ESLint configuration
- missing parser/plugin packages
- incorrect working directory
- invalid rules
- actual code violations

Required result:

- lint command exits 0
- no unresolved import errors
- no React Hook violations in changed code
- no unsafe unused variables
- no hidden warnings treated as success

==================================================
ITEM 6 — MAKE ALL EXPO TESTS PASS
==================================================

Current report says tests are partial.

Run all applicable Expo tests:

- mixed feed
- feed ordering
- display_type mapping
- InvestmentCard
- image carousel
- ReelCard
- viewport sizing
- Home route
- Reels route
- Landing route
- View Deal
- Invest Now
- owner login
- Owner AI
- attachments
- navigation

Required result:

- all in-scope tests pass
- no test exits with missing-module errors
- no skipped critical tests
- exact pass/fail totals returned

==================================================
ITEM 7 — REGISTER AND VERIFY EXPO PROJECT
==================================================

Audit:

- Expo project ID
- EAS project ID
- app slug
- owner/account
- Android package name
- runtime version
- update URL
- production update channel
- app version
- versionCode
- eas.json
- app.json/app.config

Required:

- one Expo project
- one Android package
- one production profile
- no Kotlin project identity
- no duplicate app registration
- production API URLs only
- no localhost or LAN URLs
- no Rork runtime service
- no secrets in EXPO_PUBLIC variables

Return:

- Expo project ID
- Android package
- version
- versionCode
- production profile
- update channel

==================================================
ITEM 8 — VERIFY FINAL EXPO UI
==================================================

Home must show:

1. Regular Investment Card
2. Regular Investment Card
3. Regular Investment Card
4. Casa Rosario Reel Card

Regular Investment Card:

- compact
- supports up to 8 images
- horizontal swipe
- image counter
- View Deal
- Invest Now
- categories
- like/comment/save/share

Reels module:

- full reel design
- self-adjusting height
- no clipping
- no bottom-tab overlap
- one active video
- no stretched layout

Landing:

- approved mixed-feed design
- no old all-reels regression
- no 404
- no jumping

==================================================
ITEM 9 — BUILD FINAL SIGNED APK
==================================================

Build from:

expo/

Not from:

android-ivx-holdings/

Required:

- signed release APK
- production configuration
- latest GitHub SHA
- no debug menu
- no development banner
- complete IVX app
- correct package
- correct API endpoints
- all current modules included

APK filename:

ivx-holdings-v<version>-build<versionCode>-final.apk

Return:

- APK filename
- build ID
- version
- versionCode
- size
- SHA-256
- build timestamp
- GitHub SHA

==================================================
ITEM 10 — PUBLISH DIRECT APK LINK
==================================================

Upload the APK to:

Preferred:
1. GitHub Release
2. Owner-controlled storage
3. Permanent EAS artifact URL

The owner must receive a clickable HTTPS link.

Verify:

- HTTP 200
- file downloads
- APK size matches
- SHA-256 matches
- link is not a local sandbox path
- link does not require Rork workspace access
- link is not already expired

==================================================
ITEM 11 — DEPLOY ALL ACTIVE SERVICES
==================================================

Deploy:

- backend
- landing
- Expo update if applicable
- final APK release

Verify:

GitHub SHA
=
Render deployed SHA
=
runtime health SHA
=
APK source SHA

Return:

- GitHub commit SHA
- Render deploy ID
- landing deploy ID
- Expo update ID
- APK build ID
- production URLs
- health 200
- readiness 200

==================================================
ITEM 12 — FINAL REAL-DEVICE CHECKLIST
==================================================

Provide the APK link and ask the owner to test:

1. Install APK.
2. Open app.
3. Owner login.
4. Home loads.
5. First 3 regular cards appear.
6. Image carousel works.
7. Fourth item is Casa Rosario reel.
8. Reels screen fits device.
9. View Deal works.
10. Invest Now works.
11. Owner AI responds.
12. Image upload works.
13. PDF upload works.
14. Close/reopen app.
15. Session persists.
16. Messages persist.
17. Android back button works.
18. No crash.
19. No infinite loading.
20. No debug banner.

Do not claim physical-device verification until this is completed.

==================================================
MANDATORY FINAL REPORT
==================================================

PROJECT SEPARATION:
- Expo active:
- Backend active:
- Kotlin preserved:
- Kotlin excluded from Phase 1 build:

MIXED FEED:
- Production route:
- HTTP status:
- First item:
- Second item:
- Third item:
- Fourth item:
- display_type live:

TYPESCRIPT:
- Command:
- Exit code:
- Error count:

LINT:
- Command:
- Exit code:
- Warning/error count:

TESTS:
- Total:
- Passed:
- Failed:
- Skipped:

EXPO:
- Project ID:
- Android package:
- Version:
- Version code:
- Build profile:
- Update channel:

GITHUB:
- Repository:
- Branch:
- Commit SHA:
- Remote SHA:

DEPLOYMENTS:
- Render deploy ID:
- Landing deploy ID:
- Expo update ID:
- Deployed SHA:
- Health:
- Readiness:

APK:
- Filename:
- Direct download URL:
- Version:
- Build:
- Build ID:
- Size:
- SHA-256:
- Source SHA:

KOTLIN:
- Folder preserved:
- Current build involvement: ZERO
- Future Phase 2 ready: YES/NO

REMAINING ISSUES:
- NONE or exact issue

FINAL STATUS:
VERIFIED / FAILED / BLOCKED

VERIFIED RULE:

Use VERIFIED only when:

- mixed-feed endpoint is live with HTTP 200
- display_type is live
- TypeScript has 0 errors
- lint exits 0
- all critical Expo tests pass
- Expo project is correctly registered
- Kotlin is preserved but excluded
- backend and landing are deployed
- signed Expo APK is built
- direct APK link returns HTTP 200
- GitHub SHA and deployed source match
- no P0/P1 build blocker remains
